name: Myanmar Idol
overview: Myanmar Idol is a popular Myanmar singing contest television series that is broadcast on Myanmar National TV (MNTV).[1] Its first season, in 2015, was described by The Myanmar Times as a "wild success".[2] Due to its popularity, it has been extended for a fifth season in 2020. Since Season 3, the competition format has utilized a wild card during the top 4+1 show.
